← Terug naar Home

I love web

For my journal/playground I included a Wiki. This wiki contains notes used for my learning journal (which were previously written in JSON 😞 ).
To turn these markdown files into readable content I will be using 11ty. This process will also be included in my journal!

This wiki contains some of my findings including new CSS features, important notes and styling priciples. This wiki is meant as a digital notebook/journal to help myself and others discover new things on the web.
